description_long: This is a round, two-tiered wooden table with a dark finish and ornate design. The tabletop and lower shelf are both circular, with the upper surface featuring a distinctive decorative edge composed of evenly spaced, rectangular notches and metallic trim. Four intricately carved legs connect the two tiers, each leg displaying a series of turned and fluted details that add to the table's classical aesthetic. The lower shelf mirrors the upper in shape and edge detailing, providing additional storage or display space. The overall construction appears sturdy, with the decorative elements suggesting a vintage or antique style. The table's materials and craftsmanship make it suitable for both functional and decorative use in urban environments.
description: A round, two-tiered wooden table with ornate carved legs and a notched, metallic-trimmed edge. Features a dark finish and classical decorative details.
description_view_0: Front view showing the round tabletop with notched metallic trim and two carved legs clearly visible.
description_view_1: Slightly rotated view revealing more of the lower shelf and the detailed carving on the legs.
description_view_2: Side view highlighting the symmetry of the legs and the matching notched trim on both tiers.
description_view_3: Opposite angle showing the same ornate features, with the decorative edge and leg details prominent.
